claims.quote: Several different types of volunteer opportunities are available at all five facilities. Some volunteer service areas may include interaction with our patient population. claims.limitations: Page describes generic volunteer roles (gift shop, clerical, trolley) and a teen volunteer program; no medical-student, observership, or premed clinical-experience language present.
